sections.content_preview:
Good news, your Body-Signal Learning Layer underwear shipped today. Your tracking number is below so you can follow the package as it makes its way to you.

sections.name: When It Arrives — First Steps
sections.content_preview: When the package arrives, here's what helps: Wash the underwear before first use, cold water, gentle cycle, no fabric softener. The Body-Signal Layer works best when the cotton is clean and absorbent.
